note: Bilingual hospital nodes; logo from hospital_logo_map.json

hospitals.name_zh: 中国医学科学院北京协和医院
hospitals.name_en: Peking Union Medical College Hospital
hospitals.logo: 中国医学科学院北京协和医院.png
hospitals.advantage_zh: 作为全国罕见病诊疗协作网牵头单位，中国罕见病联盟牵头单位，国内顶尖罕见病专家领衔，牵头编写罕见病诊疗指南作为国内首个罕见病专门科室，实力雄厚。
hospitals.advantage_en: As the lead unit of the National Rare Disease Diagnosis and Treatment Collaboration Network and the China Rare Disease Alliance, it is spearheaded by top domestic rare disease experts. It took the lead in compiling the Rare Disease Diagnosis and Treatment Guidelines and, as the first dedicated rare disease department in China, possesses substantial strength.

hospitals.name_zh: 北京大学第三医院
hospitals.name_en: Peking University Third Hospital
hospitals.logo: 北京大学第三医院.png
hospitals.advantage_zh: 北医三院具有多个应对不同罕见病类型的多学科团队，也是中国罕见病联盟成员机构之一。其罕见病诊治中心有对应WHS的专门多学科团队：由魏瑗教授牵头的遗传异常的早发型胎儿生长受限诊疗团队。
hospitals.advantage_en: Peking University Third Hospital has multiple multidisciplinary teams addressing different rare disease types and is a member institution of the China Rare Disease Alliance. Its Rare Disease Diagnosis and Treatment Center has a dedicated multidisciplinary team for WHS: the Early-Onset Fetal Growth Restriction Diagnosis and Treatment Team led by Professor Wei Yuan, focusing on genetic abnormalities.

hospitals.name_zh: 北京大学第一医院
hospitals.name_en: Peking University First Hospital
hospitals.logo: 北京大学第一医院.png
hospitals.advantage_zh: 作为全国罕见病诊疗协作网北京市牵头医院，设有罕见病医学中心，由多位罕见病领域专家领衔且有专门的儿童疑难罕见病多学科会诊中心，对儿科罕见病有着丰富经验。
hospitals.advantage_en: As the lead hospital in Beijing for the National Rare Disease Diagnosis and Treatment Collaboration Network, it has established a Rare Disease Medical Centre, led by multiple rare disease experts, and features a dedicated Multidisciplinary Consultation Centre for Complex Paediatric Rare Diseases, offering extensive experience in paediatric rare diseases.

hospitals.name_zh: 天津儿童医院
hospitals.name_en: Tianjin Children's Hospital
hospitals.logo: 天津儿童医院.png
hospitals.advantage_zh: 作为天津市唯一三级甲等综合性儿科医院，同时作为京津冀儿童疑难重症诊疗核心平台，长期将儿童罕见病诊疗作为核心特色，是中国罕见病联盟天津协作组牵头单位。
hospitals.advantage_en: As the only tertiary-level A comprehensive paediatric hospital in Tianjin and a core platform for diagnosing and treating complex paediatric conditions in the Beijing-Tianjin-Hebei region, it has long made paediatric rare disease diagnosis and treatment a core specialty. It is the lead unit of the Tianjin Collaboration Group of the China Rare Disease Alliance.

hospitals.name_zh: 中国医科大学附属盛京医院
hospitals.name_en: Shengjing Hospital of China Medical University
hospitals.logo: 中国医科大学附属盛京医院.png
hospitals.advantage_zh: 作为东北及内蒙古地区儿童罕见病联盟牵头单位，拥有国家儿童医学中心，其发育儿科曾作为发表单位发表数篇关于WHS诊治的论文。
hospitals.advantage_en: As the lead unit of the Rare Disease Alliance for Children in Northeast China and Inner Mongolia, it houses the National Children's Medical Center. Its Developmental Pediatrics department has published several papers on the diagnosis and treatment of WHS.

hospitals.name_zh: 哈尔滨医科大学附属第一医院
hospitals.name_en: The First Affiliated Hospital of Harbin Medical University
hospitals.logo: 哈尔滨医科大学附属第一医院.png
hospitals.advantage_zh: 该院设置有罕见病门诊，专精于全外显子测序技术与多学科协作，在罕见病诊断上有着丰富的经验。
hospitals.advantage_en: The hospital has a dedicated rare disease clinic, specialising in whole exome sequencing technology and multidisciplinary collaboration, with extensive experience in diagnosing rare diseases.

hospitals.name_zh: 上海交通大学医学院附属新华医院
hospitals.name_en: Xinhua Hospital Affiliated to Shanghai Jiao Tong University School of Medicine
hospitals.logo: 上海交通大学医学院附属新华医院.png
hospitals.advantage_zh: 作为上海市罕见病质量控制中心，拥有出生缺陷诊断平台，覆盖从孕前到成年全流程，其特别设置的儿童罕见病诊治中心有多位罕见病专家，包括邱文娟主任医师、张惠文主任医师等等顶尖专家。
hospitals.advantage_en: As the Shanghai Rare Disease Quality Control Centre, it operates a birth defect diagnosis platform covering the entire process from pre-pregnancy to adulthood. Its specially established Children's Rare Disease Diagnosis and Treatment Centre features multiple rare disease experts, including Chief Physician Qiu Wenjuan, Chief Physician Zhang Huiwen, and other top specialists.

hospitals.name_zh: 上海交通大学医学院附属瑞金医院
hospitals.name_en: Ruijin Hospital, Shanghai Jiao Tong University School of Medicine
hospitals.logo: 上海交通大学医学院附属瑞金医院.png
hospitals.advantage_zh: 瑞金医院在罕见病诊疗领域有着丰富的经验，聚集了八大科室组成多学科团队，对多种罕见病都有治疗经验，可以由医师发起组织多学科会诊对罕见病进行针对性诊治。
hospitals.advantage_en: Ruijin Hospital has extensive experience in the field of rare disease diagnosis and treatment, bringing together a multidisciplinary team from eight departments. It has treatment experience for various rare diseases and can organise multidisciplinary consultations initiated by physicians for targeted diagnosis and treatment of rare diseases.

hospitals.name_zh: 上海交通大学医学院附属上海儿童医学中心
hospitals.name_en: Shanghai Children's Medical Center
hospitals.logo: 上海交通大学医学院附属上海儿童医学中心.png
hospitals.advantage_zh: 作为国家儿童医学中心，可以诊断超600种罕见病，在罕见病处理尤其是儿童罕见病处理上有着丰富的经验，在基因诊断，遗传咨询等方面实力拔尖。
hospitals.advantage_en: As the National Children's Medical Center, it can diagnose over 600 rare diseases, with extensive experience in managing rare diseases, especially in children. It excels in genetic diagnosis and genetic counselling.

hospitals.name_zh: 南京医科大学附属儿童医院
hospitals.name_en: Children's Hospital of Nanjing Medical University
hospitals.logo: 南京医科大学附属儿童医院.png
hospitals.advantage_zh: 该院有过明确的WHS诊疗经验，其康复科曾经收治过4例WHS患者，也有过使用CMA精确确诊过WHS患者并制定后续治疗计划，在WHS治疗上有直接的经验。
hospitals.advantage_en: This hospital has clear experience in diagnosing and treating WHS. Its rehabilitation department has previously admitted 4 WHS patients, and it has used CMA to accurately diagnose WHS patients and formulate subsequent treatment plans, providing direct experience in WHS management.

hospitals.name_zh: 浙江大学医学院附属儿童医院
hospitals.name_en: Children's Hospital, Zhejiang University School of Medicine
hospitals.logo: 浙江大学医学院附属儿童医院.png
hospitals.advantage_zh: 作为国家儿童区域医疗中心，在遗传诊疗领域是区域引领者，曾有过诊断出WHS患者的经历，设置有“儿童出生缺陷与罕见病诊治中心”。
hospitals.advantage_en: As the National Regional Children's Medical Center, it is a regional leader in genetic diagnosis and treatment, with experience in diagnosing WHS patients. It has established a 'Children's Birth Defects and Rare Disease Diagnosis and Treatment Center'.

hospitals.name_zh: 江西省儿童医院/江西省妇幼保健院
hospitals.name_en: Jiangxi Provincial Children's Hospital / Jiangxi Maternal and Child Health Hospital
hospitals.logo: 江西省儿童医院_江西省妇幼保健院.png
hospitals.advantage_zh: 江西省儿童医院作为省级儿童专科医院，有收治WHS患者的经验，同时在罕见病诊疗领域有着多位专家。作为江西区域的区域儿童医疗中心，可为江西周边患者提供就近医疗。
hospitals.advantage_en: Jiangxi Provincial Children's Hospital, as a provincial children's specialist hospital, has experience in admitting WHS patients and has multiple experts in the field of rare disease diagnosis and treatment. As a regional children's medical centre in Jiangxi, it can provide nearby medical care for patients in the Jiangxi area.

hospitals.name_zh: 广州市妇女儿童医疗中心
hospitals.name_en: Guangzhou Women and Children's Medical Center
hospitals.logo: 广州市妇女儿童医疗中心.png
hospitals.advantage_zh: 广妇儿是广东省罕见病诊疗协作网牵头单位，同时在儿童罕见病方面有着独特优势，是华南地区规模最大、技术力量最强的罕见病诊治中心之一。
hospitals.advantage_en: Guangzhou Women and Children's Medical Center is the leading unit of the Guangdong Rare Disease Diagnosis and Treatment Collaboration Network, and has unique advantages in paediatric rare diseases. It is one of the largest and most technically advanced rare disease diagnosis and treatment centres in South China.

hospitals.name_zh: 中山大学附属第一医院
hospitals.name_en: The First Affiliated Hospital, Sun Yat-sen University
hospitals.logo: 中山大学附属第一医院.png
hospitals.advantage_zh: 作为广东省罕见病诊疗协作网成员医院，拥有多位在罕见病诊治领域有着多位资深专家。
hospitals.advantage_en: As a member hospital of the Guangdong Rare Disease Diagnosis and Treatment Collaboration Network, it has multiple senior experts in the field of rare disease diagnosis and treatment.

hospitals.name_zh: 南方医科大学南方医院
hospitals.name_en: Nanfang Hospital, Southern Medical University
hospitals.logo: 南方医科大学南方医院.png
hospitals.advantage_zh:
南方医科大学南方医院是南方医科大学第一附属医院、南方医科大学第一临床医学院，承担临床医疗、医学教育、医学科研和预防保健等任务，是大型综合性三级甲等医院和国家区域医疗中心。医院创建于1941年，建院时为新四军第三师后方医院。1975年，医院番号调整为中国人民解放军第一军医大学第一附属医院，经总后勤部批准对外称“南方医院”。2004年，医院随第一军医大学转制移交至广东省，更名为南方医科大学南方医院。
经过八十年的办院积淀、几代人的艰苦努力，南方医院已经发展成为综合实力雄厚、学科特色突出、管理水平先进、文化底蕴深厚、在全国乃至国际享有崇高声誉影响的高水平研究型医院。
hospitals.advantage_en: Nanfang Hospital of Southern Medical University is the First Affiliated Hospital of Southern Medical University and the First Clinical Medical College of Southern Medical University. It undertakes tasks such as clinical care, medical education, medical research, and preventive healthcare, and is a large-scale comprehensive tertiary Grade A hospital and a national regional medical centre. The hospital was founded in 1941 as the Rear Hospital of the Third Division of the New Fourth Army. In 1975, its designation was adjusted to the First Affiliated Hospital of the First Military Medical University of the People's Liberation Army, and with approval from the General Logistics Department, it was externally named 'Nanfang Hospital'. In 2004, the hospital was transferred to Guangdong Province along with the First Military Medical University and renamed Nanfang Hospital of Southern Medical University. After eighty years of hospital development and the hard work of several generations, Nanfang Hospital has become a high-level research hospital with strong comprehensive strength, distinctive disciplinary features, advanced management, profound cultural heritage, and a prestigious reputation both nationally and internationally.

hospitals.name_zh: 广州市妇女儿童医疗中心柳州医院
hospitals.name_en: Guangzhou Women and Children's Medical Center Liuzhou Hospital
hospitals.logo: 广州市妇女儿童医疗中心柳州医院（广西）.png
hospitals.advantage_zh: 作为广州妇女儿童医疗中心在广西的分医院，有着多位罕见病专家，同时可以通过远程会诊与广妇儿本部专家共同会诊，可以为广西周边的患者提供更加便利的诊疗。
hospitals.advantage_en: As a branch hospital of Guangzhou Women and Children's Medical Center in Guangxi, it has multiple rare disease experts. Additionally, through remote consultation with experts from the main Guangzhou Women and Children's Medical Center, it can provide more convenient diagnosis and treatment for patients in the Guangxi area.

hospitals.name_zh: 四川大学华西医院
hospitals.name_en: West China Hospital, Sichuan University
hospitals.logo: 四川大学华西医院.png
hospitals.advantage_zh: 有多学科会诊以及罕见病诊疗中心，全国罕见病诊疗协作网西南地区核心，对于罕见病患者有就诊绿色通道，同时提供线上申请方式，可通过华西罕见病平微信公众号进行申请。
hospitals.advantage_en: It has a multidisciplinary consultation and rare disease diagnosis and treatment centre, serving as the core of the national rare disease diagnosis and treatment collaborative network in the southwest region. It provides a green channel for rare disease patients to access medical care, along with an online application method via the Huaxi Rare Disease Platform on WeChat.

hospitals.name_zh: 四川大学华西第二医院/四川大学妇产儿童医院
hospitals.name_en: West China Second University Hospital / Sichuan University Women and Children's Hospital
hospitals.logo: 四川大学华西第二医院_四川大学妇产儿童医院.png
hospitals.advantage_zh: 作为华西地区儿童罕见病特长，有一站式服务，基因诊断等等平台，同时是国家儿童区域（区域）医疗中心，西南地区儿科疑难重症转诊中心。
hospitals.advantage_en: As a specialist in paediatric rare diseases in the Huaxi region, it offers one-stop services, genetic diagnosis platforms, and is a national children's regional medical centre, as well as a referral centre for complex paediatric cases in southwest China.

hospitals.name_zh: 重庆医科大学附属儿童医院
hospitals.name_en: Children's Hospital of Chongqing Medical University
hospitals.logo: 重庆医科大学附属儿童医院.png
hospitals.advantage_zh: 作为西部地区儿童神经疾病诊治中心，全国小儿罕见病学组副组长单位，有过收治WHS患者的经验，尤其在神经类罕见病专长。
hospitals.advantage_en: As a diagnosis and treatment centre for paediatric neurological diseases in the western region and the deputy chair unit of the National Paediatric Rare Disease Group, it has experience in treating WHS patients, with particular expertise in neurological rare diseases.

hospitals.name_zh: 西安交通大学第一附属医院
hospitals.name_en: The First Affiliated Hospital of Xi'an Jiaotong University
hospitals.logo: 西安交通大学第一附属医院.png
hospitals.advantage_zh: 为西北地区儿童疑难症，罕见病的主要诊治单位之一，设有国家级癫痫综合诊治中心，同时有过收治WHS患者的经验
hospitals.advantage_en: It is one of the main diagnosis and treatment units for complex paediatric diseases and rare diseases in the northwest region, with a national-level comprehensive epilepsy diagnosis and treatment centre, and has experience in treating WHS patients.

hospitals.name_zh: 华中科技大学同济医学院附属同济医院
hospitals.name_en: Tongji Hospital, Tongji Medical College of HUST
hospitals.logo: 华中科技大学同济医学院附属同济医院.png
hospitals.advantage_zh: 该院为华中地区儿童罕见病龙头，湖北省罕见病质控中心，具有多个罕见病多学科诊疗团队，具有专门的儿童罕见病MDT团队，在儿童罕见病诊疗上有着丰富经验
hospitals.advantage_en: This hospital is a leading centre for childhood rare diseases in Central China, serving as the Hubei Provincial Rare Disease Quality Control Centre. It has multiple multidisciplinary teams (MDTs) for rare diseases, including a dedicated paediatric rare disease MDT, and possesses extensive experience in the diagnosis and treatment of childhood rare diseases.

hospitals.name_zh: 河南省儿童医院
hospitals.name_en: Henan Children's Hospital
hospitals.logo: 河南省儿童医院.png
hospitals.advantage_zh: 被授予“河南省儿童罕见病诊疗中心”，在罕见病诊疗领域有着丰富经验，在儿童癫痫，发育迟缓方面有多名专家。
hospitals.advantage_en: Designated as the 'Henan Provincial Children's Rare Disease Diagnosis and Treatment Centre', this hospital has extensive experience in the field of rare diseases, with several specialists in paediatric epilepsy and developmental delay.

hospitals.name_zh: 中南大学湘雅医院
hospitals.name_en: Xiangya Hospital, Central South University
hospitals.logo: 中南大学湘雅医院.png
hospitals.advantage_zh: 中国罕见病协作网重要协办单位，拥有多名罕见病专家，在儿科罕见病以及神经系统罕见病方面有丰富经验，院内特别设有罕见病中心。
hospitals.advantage_en: As an important co-organiser of the China Rare Disease Collaboration Network, this hospital has multiple rare disease experts and extensive experience in paediatric rare diseases and neurological rare diseases. It has a dedicated Rare Disease Centre within the hospital.
